## Journal.JournalLibrary.getJournalsForFillingVersion() method

Gets all [filling recipe journal records](./ts-chocolate.journal.ifillingrecipejournalrecord.md) for a specific filling version

**Signature:**

```typescript
getJournalsForFillingVersion(versionId: FillingVersionId): ReadonlyArray<IFillingRecipeJournalRecord>;
```
